title: Chapter 5 · Launchable Product
subtitle: Add login, AI assistance, payments, and final production checks.
description: Finish the product loop with authentication, an AI assistant, Stripe payments, and a production launch checklist.

completion_message: You have built and launched a complete product flow. You are no longer only experimenting with AI coding; you can use it to ship.
